title: Excel 真係好撚難 可以點學？ 返工返到灰

replies.msg:
返工返到好有挫敗感

開始好多task要用formula做 將啲資料射黎射去
或者係一堆野入面搵有用既data

要交差就成日不停狂做做做 有啲明知可以用formula可以好快解決既任務 成日因爲唔識啲logic/ command 所以卡住好耐

最後都係用啲好on9好人手既方法做完佢

明知有捷徑但係唔識走 只可以用最蠢既辦法過關
呢種感覺真係好難受

有無人知點樣可以改善 覺得自己一事無成
最慘係人地整左個template，入面啲formula完全睇唔明，有野改都唔識改

自己去圖書館借本EXCEL入門
2日睇熟應該已經可以應對日常工作

A 9 B 2 C 5 D 6

如果我想係第二行 一格寫 9 , 隔離嗰格look返個A出黎
(即係搵到9字既話就將佢左一格既cell read出黎)

應該點做？

excel都難，一個星期上手啦

一定要梅花間竹？似乎整個table好啲，一個column專係字母，一個𡧛係數字，可以嗎？

自學方法係，將個task breakdown做最簡單，然後google。

你第一個task係 find the largest number within a column and return the cell number -- 你咁樣google下一定得

第二個task係 use a cell number to return the value of the cell next to it，你試下搵唔搵到啲乜。我印象中係可用offset。

最慘係人地整左個template，入面啲formula完全睇唔明，有野改都唔識改

學excel最好同最快嘅方法係抄人formula
如果你連抄都唔識，不如放棄

屌你老母
點解你呢啲咁撚蠢既仆街會有工開

Google Code Jam 2017
Qualification Round:

================

Problem:

Last year, the Infinite House of Pancakes introduced a new kind of pancake. It has a happy face made of chocolate chips on one side (the "happy side"), and nothing on the other side (the "blank side").

You are the head cook on duty. The pancakes are cooked in a single row over a hot surface. As part of its infinite efforts to maximize efficiency, the House has recently given you an oversized pancake flipper that flips exactly K consecutive pancakes. That is, in that range of K pancakes, it changes every happy-side pancake to a blank-side pancake, and vice versa; it does not change the left-to-right order of those pancakes.

You cannot flip fewer than K pancakes at a time with the flipper, even at the ends of the row (since there are raised borders on both sides of the cooking surface). For example, you can flip the first K pancakes, but not the first K - 1 pancakes.

Your apprentice cook, who is still learning the job, just used the old-fashioned single-pancake flipper to flip some individual pancakes and then ran to the restroom with it, right before the time when customers come to visit the kitchen. You only have the oversized pancake flipper left, and you need to use it quickly to leave all the cooking pancakes happy side up, so that the customers leave feeling happy with their visit.

Given the current state of the pancakes, calculate the minimum number of uses of the oversized pancake flipper needed to leave all pancakes happy side up, or state that there is no way to do it.

Input

The first line of the input gives the number of test cases, T. T test cases follow. Each consists of one line with a string S and an integer K. S represents the row of pancakes: each of its characters is either + (which represents a pancake that is initially happy side up) or - (which represents a pancake that is initially blank side up).

Output

For each test case, output one line containing Case #x: y, where x is the test case number (starting from 1) and y is either IMPOSSIBLE if there is no way to get all the pancakes happy side up, or an integer representing the the minimum number of times you will need to use the oversized pancake flipper to do it.

Limits

1 ≤ T ≤ 100.
Every character in S is either + or -.
2 ≤ K ≤ length of S.
Small dataset

2 ≤ length of S ≤ 10.
Large dataset

2 ≤ length of S ≤ 1000.
Sample

Input
3
---+-++- 3
+++++ 4
-+-+- 4

Output
Case #1: 3
Case #2: 0
Case #3: IMPOSSIBLE

In Case #1, you can get all the pancakes happy side up by first flipping the leftmost 3 pancakes, getting to ++++-++-, then the rightmost 3, getting to ++++---+, and finally the 3 pancakes that remain blank side up. There are other ways to do it with 3 flips or more, but none with fewer than 3 flips.

In Case #2, all of the pancakes are already happy side up, so there is no need to flip any of them.

In Case #3, there is no way to make the second and third pancakes from the left have the same side up, because any flip flips them both. Therefore, there is no way to make all of the pancakes happy side up.

YEAH! 好好玩~


#include <iostream>
#include <string>
#include <iomanip>

using namespace std;

class PancakeFlipper{
public:

string pancake; // The pancake string
int flipperSize; // The flipper size
int flipCnt; // The flip counter
bool pass; // If all happy

PancakeFlipper(); // Always a constructor

// Acceupt the pancake from the world;
void in(string inPancake, int inFlipperSize);

// Output the pancake
void out();

// Cook the pancake, make it all happy side
void cook();

private:
// Check if the cooked pancake are all happy size
void qc();

// Flip the pancake with the filpper
void flip(int position);


void flip(char &pancake);

};

// Empty constructor
PancakeFlipper:ancakeFlipper(){
}

// Take the pancake
void PancakeFlipper::in(string inPancake, int inFlipperSize) {

pancake = inPancake;
flipperSize = inFlipperSize;
flipCnt = 0;
pass = true;
}

// Output the pancake
void PancakeFlipper::out() {
cout << pancake;
}

// Flip the pancake to happy side by the oversize flipper
void PancakeFlipper::cook() {

int len = pancake.length();
for(int i=0;i<=len-flipperSize;i++){
if(pancake[i] == '-' && i + flipperSize <= len ){
flip(i);
}
}

// Check if all hapoy face
qc();
}

// If all happy face, set qc pass to true
void PancakeFlipper::qc() {
int len = pancake.length();
for(int i=0;i<len;i++){
if(pancake[i] == '-'){
pass = false;
break;
}
}
}

// Flip pancake with oversize pancke flipper
void PancakeFlipper::flip(int pos) {

for(int j=0;j<flipperSize;j++){
this->flip(pancake[pos+j]);
}
flipCnt++;
}

// Flip single pancake in poistion
void PancakeFlipper::flip(char &pancake) {
if(pancake == '-'){
pancake = '+';
}else{
pancake = '-';
}
}

int main() {

PancakeFlipper* pf = new PancakeFlipper();

int t, k;
string s;

cin >> t;

for (int i = 1; i <= t; i++) {

// read pancake fase and flipper size
cin >> s >> k;

// Take the pancake
pf->in(s,k);

// cock the pancake
pf->cook();

// Output
cout << "Case #" << i << ": ";

//cout << std::left << std::setw(11) << s;
//cout << std::left << std::setw(4) << k;
//pf->out();

if(pf->pass){
cout << pf->flipCnt;
}else{
cout << "IMPOSSIBLE";
}
cout << endl;

}

return 0;
}

分享下我既excel 之路
一開頭係一個會計小薯.
其實做左幾個月都已經發現根本excel 勁少少已經係響小薯入面有好大優勢.
個陣都係停留響瘋狂if + vlookup + text 有關既formula. 已經可以算係唔錯
例如撈十萬行數落黎. 點樣set d logic 出黎for 老細sorting. 做倒呢樣已經係掌握一般需要用到既function.
e.g. 十萬行入邊想搵出 xxxxxx-yyy-zzzz 既yyy

再另一個層次就係vba. 開始玩到vba 就可以幫部門做streamline. automate 大量師奶既工序, 又或者整大量report generator 出黎

再另一個層次就係講梗calculation efficiency. 呢個stage 我已經轉左field 做FP&A. 資料實在太大, 如果你set d function 配合vba 太冗長就會calculate 成粒鐘.咁就要開始學識點樣寫到個program or function run 得更快.

而家睇返學呢門手藝極有用. 響會計界入面變精英. 當然同IT PROGRAMMER 相比係小毛見大毛.但會計界入面夠晒撈.

同埋有呢套思維, 幫助我而家做system implementation.

多col先要用index+match

因為performance問題
首先你要明白vlookup 其實就係optimized左既index+match
單col lookup vlookup係有優勢(雖然我都係唔會用vlookup)
單個lookup, 假設index+match用1秒, vlookup 只係用0.99秒

但多col情況下, 你可以加一個col做lookup既"index"
例如係A果個COL 先做MATCH,搵左你想要既DATA係第幾行先
然後再用INDEX refer 番A col 既值做 row_index
咁做有咩好處?
其實index+match 既bottleneck係match度
excel做lookup果下係非常慢(例如match,vlookup)
而reference係非常快(例如index, offset)
上面提既1秒, 其實有99.9%既時間係用黎做match
當你有10個col既data要抽出黎
match + index 只需要 1 次 match + 10次 index
而果10下index係接近唔使load既
但vlookup你要做10次完整既lookup,幾optimize都救唔番
所以愈多col,愈多condition,愈多array,愈應該index + match

當然學 index match 仲有好多好處

Dictionary是用add method增加內容

我唔明多層dict點用
見人係咁

dic(i)(j)(k) 咁用

是咁啲 要用nested方式去起

dict.Add("First", dicta)
dict.Add("Second", dictb)

首先起first同second兩個sub dict,
咁大dict就會包左First同Second兩樣野
而佢地嘅內容就會係variable dicta同dictb

dict.Values(0).Add("Sub First 1", 100)
dict.Values(0).Add("Sub First 2", 83)
dict.Values(0).Add("Sub First 3", 24)
dict.Values(1).Add("Sub Second 1", 2)
dict.Values(1).Add("Sub Second 2", 0.009)
dict.Values(1).Add("Sub Second 3", 9)
然後再將第二層內容放落去variable
咁最後就可以有N層dictionary

咁最後dict.Item("First").Item("Sub First 3") 就會出到24

個個情況唔同咁様其實都冇意義
不如回歸原點睇下一開始既爭論係咩先
本身講緊vlookup 唔掂，轉用match會好d
而你話要快就用vba

個問題就黎，其實邊個快既答案係在於多data實際上就係「多」到咩程度
vlookup 既慢係，可能1000row x 10 col已經有lag感
同樣情況下index match 可能去到10000 row x 10 col先有lag感

如果去到多sheet + 幾萬row
可能你用vba會更快
因為formula cross sheet reference本身就慢

再極端d講如果去到多workbook reference我覺得根本就唔應該用vba,任何一個programming lanuage 加library都明顯計得快過vba

所以不斷將個情況提高然後講邊個快其實唔會有意義同答案
任何野都好，有需要就用吧

今日返工係website搵到VBA 關於Batch Print file to PDF既 commend, 又可以改PDF既名,都幾有用

Sub BatchPrintToPDF()
'
' BatchPrintToPDF 巨集
'

'

Dim i As Integer
Dim x As Integer

Sheets("ItemList").Activate
Range("a1").Select
x = Selection.CurrentRegion.Rows.Count

For i = 1 To 999

Workbooks("Test").Activate
Sheets("ABC").Select
Range("C4").Select
ActiveCell.FormulaR1C1 = "=VLOOKUP(RC[-2],ItemList!C1:C2,2,0)"
Range("A4").Select
ActiveCell.FormulaR1C1 = i

ActiveSheet.ExportAsFixedFormat Type:=xlTypePDF, filename:="D:\" &
Range("C4").Value _
, Quality:=xlQualityStandard, IncludeDocProperties:=True, IgnorePrintAreas _
:=False, OpenAfterPublish:=False

Next i

' ActiveWorkbook.Save


End Sub

用match and index with array formula都得: {=INDEX(F1:F3,MATCH(D8&E8,D13&E1:E3,0))}
F = 價錢，D = 日期，E = 貨名

用vlookup with array formula: {=vlookup(D8&E8,(if,{(1,0)},D13&E1:E3,F1:F3,0))}

比古你本身應該識formula同array formula架可?

識

咁你玩下第一題double square先

(當input個數叫A1)

其實呢題就係要搵 A1 = x^2 + y^2 既組合數

1. 計A1 - x^2
x 唔知係幾多?唔緊要,因為你知係整數,所以可以brute force 減 1^2,2^2,3^2...
減到幾時停? 其實有個理論值..諗下係幾多
(假設y = 1 , x 最大應該係幾多 )
當然你可以brute force到 (A1)^2, 不過excel會爆炸

2. step-1減完出黎個數其實就係"y^2", 將呢個數開方, 得出y

3. 因為x 同 y 都係整數,所以你要判斷佢係唔係整數

4. 將「y係整數」既case sum起佢, 得出組合數

5. 呢個組合數其實比答案大左一倍, 睇題目

6. 將呢個組合數/2, 「有一個情況」會導致出小數 (.5) , 要處理下佢, 之後就做完

步驟就係咁

前言
1.呢個系列既題目係自己諗,小部份靈感來自其他coding game
2.由於自己寫,冇好大既case number去試,可能會有少少bug
或者rules有矛盾/唔清楚,有問題歡迎提出
3.最初整左呢堆題目出黎既諗法係:
係唔set variable既情況下,好易出現要重覆運算既情況, 最常出現就係要做determination果陣
例如:if(a=???,a,a+b)
咁就call左3次a, 如果a 本身係一個用200個char計出黎既result,咁樣做一次if就triple變左600個char
遊戲目標就係要避開呢種情況, call 一次a, 就要出答案
雖然咁講,但答案本身唔限長度,所以係唔係一定慳左code?
冇所謂,最緊要好玩
4.全部題目都驗證過有答案

規則:
1. (最重要) 題目提供既variable只可以call一次,例如題目既test case係{368,123},formula入面就只可以用一次{368,123}
2. 所有case請直接hard code 入formula入面
例如test case 係{369,123}, 請直接寫入formula = ..... {369,123}....
唔需要放係另一個cell再call
(原因請參照前言(3),好似「a」呢d中間產物,通常係array/value而唔係reference)
3. 單條formula,no names no vba
4. 歡迎討論交流,但唔好直接R提示,提示就係: 夾硬「扭」個答案出黎
5. 唔特別要求短,創意為先,希望個個寫法唔同
6. 要求既答案通常係array, single cell show唔到array, 唔緊要, 只要係formula bar 度 F9 出到答案就過關

新題目

前言
1.呢個系列既題目係自己諗,小部份靈感來自其他coding game
2.由於自己寫,冇好大既case number去試,可能會有少少bug
或者rules有矛盾/唔清楚,有問題歡迎提出
3.最初整左呢堆題目出黎既諗法係:
係唔set variable既情況下,好易出現要重覆運算既情況, 最常出現就係要做determination果陣
例如:if(a=???,a,a+b)
咁就call左3次a, 如果a 本身係一個用200個char計出黎既result,咁樣做一次if就triple變左600個char
遊戲目標就係要避開呢種情況, call 一次a, 就要出答案
雖然咁講,但答案本身唔限長度,所以係唔係一定慳左code?
冇所謂,最緊要好玩
4.全部題目都驗證過有答案

規則:
1. (最重要) 題目提供既variable只可以call一次,例如題目既test case係{368,123},formula入面就只可以用一次{368,123}
2. 所有case請直接hard code 入formula入面
例如test case 係{369,123}, 請直接寫入formula = ..... {369,123}....
唔需要放係另一個cell再call
(原因請參照前言(3),好似「a」呢d中間產物,通常係array/value而唔係reference)
3. 單條formula,no names no vba
4. 歡迎討論交流,但唔好直接R提示,提示就係: 夾硬「扭」個答案出黎
5. 唔特別要求短,創意為先,希望個個寫法唔同
6. 要求既答案通常係array, single cell show唔到array, 唔緊要, 只要係formula bar 度 F9 出到答案就過關
